title: Which are the best Evangelion games
display_title: Which are the best Evangelion games
wikitext: []: Which are the best Evangelion games?             Quote Post by eva14 » Sun Oct 19, 2014 10:59 am The kind of Evangelion game that I'm looking for is like in the series, that is, robots battling the crap out of each other until one's defeated. I've tried the following games: 1) Zone of the Enders [PS2] 2) War of the Monsters [PS2] 3) Tech Romancer [DC] 4) Gundam Breaker [PS3] 5) Evangelion Battle Orchestra [PSP] (it was like playing a mediocre ripoff of Smash Bros.) 6) Evangelion 64 [N64] And the problem is that none of these recreate the experience of the show itself, but hope that an Eva fan somewhere can help me out on this journey. Thanks!

I've tried the following games: 1) Zone of the Enders [PS2] 2) War of the Monsters [PS2] 3) Tech Romancer [DC] 4) Gundam Breaker [PS3] 5) Evangelion Battle Orchestra

Article: Which are the best Evangelion games
[]: Which are the best Evangelion games?             Quote Post by eva14 » Sun Oct 19, 2014 10:59 am The kind of Evangelion game that I'm looking for is like in the series, that is, robots battling the crap out of each other until one's defeated. I've tried the following games: 1) Zone of the Enders [PS2] 2) War of the Monsters [PS2] 3) Tech Romancer [DC] 4) Gundam Breaker [PS3] 5) Evangelion Battle Orchestra [PSP] (it was like playing a mediocre ripoff of Smash Bros.) 6) Evangelion 64 [N64] And the problem is that none of these recreate the experience of the show itself, but hope that an Eva fan somewhere can help me out on this journey. Thanks!
